message:
feat(rchd): expand daemon API and worker selection logic

api.rs:
- Extended API endpoints for queue visibility
- New routes for build queue monitoring

main.rs:
- Daemon initialization improvements

selection.rs:
- Enhanced worker selection algorithm
- Better load balancing across available workers

workers.rs:
- Worker management improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
